overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a desolate industrial wasteland roadside in a video game environment (Cyberpunk 2077). The scene features sparse desert vegetation, abandoned industrial structures, distant city skyscrapers, and occasional futuristic vehicles passing by on a multi-lane road under harsh midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial wasteland roadside with desert scrub

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt verge beside a multi-lane road, approaching industrial buildings

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving past on the road to the right

entered.detail: tall industrial water tower with cylindrical tanks
low brick industrial structure with graffiti on walls
distant cluster of modern skyscrapers on the horizon
sparse desert vegetation scattered across the wasteland

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desolate industrial wasteland under bright midday sun. The camera walks forward along a dirt path beside a road, with a water tower and abandoned industrial buildings ahead. Sparse Joshua trees dot the landscape, while futuristic vehicles occasionally pass on the right. The distant city skyline is visible on the horizon.

events.description: road sign enters view from the left as camera approaches intersection area
dark futuristic vehicle passes very close by on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the road edge, passing a road sign as a vehicle drives by closely on the left

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan passing immediately to the left of the camera

entered.detail: back of a rectangular road sign on a metal pole
concrete traffic barrier with red and white horizontal stripes

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward, shifting slightly left. A road sign appears on the left while a red and white traffic barrier comes into view on the right. A futuristic vehicle passes very close on the left side. The industrial buildings and water tower shift to the left of the frame as the camera progresses along the road shoulder.

scene_state.functional_zone: fenced industrial lot with tire piles

events.description: camera turns left to follow alongside the red and white barrier
stack of tires comes into view on the roadside

agents.ego_description: turning left to walk parallel with the barrier, passing chain-link fencing and approaching tire stacks

entered.detail: metal chain-link fence running parallel to the road
pile of discarded vehicle tires stacked beside the road
large billboard with CHOOH2 advertisement visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to follow the red and white barrier, which now runs along the left side. A chain-link fence appears on the left, enclosing an industrial lot. The camera approaches a stack of discarded tires on the roadside. In the distance, a large billboard becomes visible against the skyline.

events.description: passing the tire stacks, entering more open highway area
multiple vehicles visible driving on the road ahead

agents.ego_description: walking past the tire stacks toward the billboard, with increased vehicle traffic visible on the road

notable_agents.action: futuristic truck driving along the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the tire stacks and continues toward the billboard, which now dominates the center of the view. The barrier and fence fall behind as the scene opens up into a wider highway approach. More vehicles are visible on the road, and the distant city skyline shifts to center frame as the camera advances.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a desolate industrial wasteland that gradually opens up toward a distant city skyline. It begins by walking along a dirt path under a harsh midday sun, passing sparse Joshua trees and abandoned industrial buildings while futuristic vehicles streak by on the adjacent road. As the camera shifts left, a road sign and a red-and-white traffic barrier emerge, momentarily narrowing the view as another vehicle passes closely. The perspective then turns to follow the barrier and a chain-link fence, gliding past stacks of discarded tires before the landscape expands. Finally, the camera advances toward a dominant roadside billboard, leaving the industrial lot behind as the scene opens into a wide highway approach with the city skyline centering in the frame.
